title: Mangrove Manor
description: A witch mansion structure in mangrove swamps
body:
![A mansion in a mangrove swamp. The text "Mangrove Manor By Braytonk" is superimposed on the image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45f82e5c016c2410292806a2ff8dcba908636062.png)
## Braytonk's Mangrove Manor
This datapack adds a new generated structure to mangrove swamps that mirrors witch huts and woodland mansions. It is designed to be vanilla-friendly and has the following key features

- Witches, and occasionally copper golems, can be found throughout the structure 
- Procedurally generated rooms and winding hallways with assorted decorations
- Loot includes common witch drops, as well as honey and milk for curing poison

The structure can be found in mangrove swamps, and can be located via the command \
`/locate structure keeb_struc_manor:manor`
